[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-11-13
[TITLE]: Fact Check: This is a big lie about a little bird - India Today
[METADATA/INTRO]: Fact Check: This is a big lie about a little bird India Today Anti Fake News War Room (AFWA) has found that the bird in the viral images is not a hummingbird....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Ina has also posted the videos of her miniature work. 
 Some of these miniatures are also available for purchase online. 
 SMALLEST BIRD IN THE WORLD 
 The smallest bird on Earth is indeed a hummingbird. 
 Most hummingbirds measure 3-5 inches, and the smallest in this species is the two-inch-long bee hummingbird. They have longer beaks that allow them to reach into crevices of flowers in search of nectar. Different species have different colours of feathers and they have a distinct ability to survive the cold weather. 
 However, the viral images are not of a hummingbird. They are actually miniatures created by an artist.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-12-17
[TITLE]: Is This a Photo of a Zunzuncito, the World's Smallest Bird? | Snopes.com
[METADATA/INTRO]: The zunzuncito, or bee hummingbird, is the world's smallest bird. This photograph does not show a zunzuncito, but rather a miniature figurine....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The figurine was created by a Bulgarian artist named Ina who runs the Facebook page Malinik Miniatures. This figurine was sold for $65 on eBay and was described as follows: 
 Dollhouse Miniature Realistic Chestnut-backed Chickadee OOAK bird - Malinik Miniatures 
 This bird is handmade from bees putty and wire armature for the legs. Then applied fibers and feathers. Marking with acrylics and pastels. 
 On the Malinik Miniatures Facebook page, Ina posted a photograph that showed the creation of this miniature chickadee: 
 Though this viral photograph is not of a real bird, the zunzuncito is indeed real and considered to be the world's smallest bird.
